# Yumma CSS
This is the documentation for the `yummacss` package.
An atomic CSS framework with abbreviated class names.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://yummacss.com/docs/installation): Yumma CSS is an atomic CSS framework that takes a different approach to utility-first styling. Instead of long, complicated utilities, Yumma CSS uses abbreviations to make class names intuitive and fast to type.
- [Configuration](https://yummacss.com/docs/configuration): Setting your first Yumma CSS project.
- [Upgrading](https://yummacss.com/docs/upgrading): Upgrade your legacy project from Yumma CSS v2 to v3.

## Foundations

- [Styling Elements](https://yummacss.com/docs/styling-elements): A guide to styling elements using Yumma CSS.
- [Colors](https://yummacss.com/docs/colors): Use colors in Yumma CSS.
- [Media Queries](https://yummacss.com/docs/media-queries): Use responsive variants for responsive user interfaces.
- [Negative Values](https://yummacss.com/docs/negative-values): Use negative values with Yumma CSS utilities.
- [Pseudo Classes](https://yummacss.com/docs/pseudo-classes): Use pseudo-classes to apply utilities in specific scenarios.
- [Pseudo Elements](https://yummacss.com/docs/pseudo-elements): Use pseudo-elements to apply utilities in specific scenarios.
- [Base Styles](https://yummacss.com/docs/base-styles): Accessible and modern set of base styles for Yumma CSS projects.

## Background

- [Background Attachment](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-attachment): Controls how the background responds to scrolling.
- [Background Clip](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-clip): Controls the box around the background of an element.
- [Background Origin](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-origin): Controls background positioning relative to borders, padding, and content.
- [Background Position](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-position): Controls the position of the background image of an element.
- [Background Repeat](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-repeat): Controls the repetition of the background image of an element.
- [Background Size](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-size): Controls the size of the background image of an element.

## Border & Outline

- [Border Collapse](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-collapse): Controls the collapsing or separation of table borders.
- [Border Radius](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-radius): Controls the radius of the borders of an element.
- [Border Spacing](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-spacing): Controls the distance between table borders.
- [Border Style](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-style): Controls the style of the borders of an element.
- [Border Width](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-width): Controls the width of the borders of an element.
- [Outline Offset](https://yummacss.com/docs/outline-offset): Controls the offset of an element
- [Outline Style](https://yummacss.com/docs/outline-style): Controls the outline style of an element.
- [Outline Width](https://yummacss.com/docs/outline-width): Controls the width of the outline of an element.

## Box Model

- [Box Sizing](https://yummacss.com/docs/box-sizing): Controls the calculation of the total size of an element.
- [Dimensions](https://yummacss.com/docs/dimensions): Controls the height and width of an element simultaneously.
- [Height](https://yummacss.com/docs/height): Controls the height of an element.
- [Margin](https://yummacss.com/docs/margin): Controls the margin of an element.
- [Padding](https://yummacss.com/docs/padding): Controls the padding of an element.
- [Width](https://yummacss.com/docs/width): Controls the width of an element.

## Colors

- [Accent Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/accent-color): Controls form control accent color.
- [Background Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-color): Controls the background color of an element.
- [Border Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-color): Controls the color of the borders of an element.
- [Caret Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/caret-color): Controls the text input cursor color.
- [Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/color): Controls the text color of an element.
- [Fill](https://yummacss.com/docs/fill): Controls the filling of SVG elements.
- [Outline Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/outline-color): Controls the color of the outline of an element.
- [Stroke](https://yummacss.com/docs/stroke): Controls the color of SVG elements.
- [Text Decoration Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-decoration-color): Controls the color of the text decoration.

## Flexbox & Grid

- [Align Content](https://yummacss.com/docs/align-content): Controls the positioning of rows in multi-row Flex and Grid containers.
- [Align Items](https://yummacss.com/docs/align-items): Controls flex and grid positioning along a container
- [Align Self](https://yummacss.com/docs/align-self): Controls the positioning of a single flex or grid element along the transverse axis of its container.
- [Flex](https://yummacss.com/docs/flex): Controls how flex elements grow and shrink.
- [Flex Basis](https://yummacss.com/docs/flex-basis): Controls the initial size of flex elements.
- [Flex Direction](https://yummacss.com/docs/flex-direction): Controls the direction of flex elements.
- [Flex Grow](https://yummacss.com/docs/flex-grow): Controls the growth of flex elements.
- [Flex Shrink](https://yummacss.com/docs/flex-shrink): Controls the shrinkage of the flex items.
- [Flex Wrap](https://yummacss.com/docs/flex-wrap): Controls how flex items are wrapped.
- [Justify Content](https://yummacss.com/docs/justify-content): Controls the positioning of flex and grid elements on a container
- [Justify Items](https://yummacss.com/docs/justify-items): Controls the alignment of grid elements relative to their inline axis.
- [Justify Self](https://yummacss.com/docs/justify-self): Controls the alignment of a single grid element relative to its inline axis.
- [Order](https://yummacss.com/docs/order): Controls the order of flex and grid items.
- [Column Gap](https://yummacss.com/docs/column-gap): Controls the spacing between columns in a grid layout.
- [Gap](https://yummacss.com/docs/gap): Controls gaps between grid and flexbox elements.
- [Grid Auto Columns](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-auto-columns): Controls the size of grid columns created implicitly.
- [Grid Auto Flow](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-auto-flow): Controls the automatic placement of grid elements.
- [Grid Auto Rows](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-auto-rows): Controls the size of grid lines created implicitly.
- [Grid Column](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-column): Controls the size and position of elements across columns.
- [Grid Row](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-row): Controls the size and position of elements across rows.
- [Grid Template Columns](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-template-columns): Utilities to define the columns in a grid layout.
- [Grid Template Rows](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-template-rows): Utilities to specify the rows in a grid layout.
- [Place Content](https://yummacss.com/docs/place-content): Control how content is justified and aligned simultaneously.
- [Place Items](https://yummacss.com/docs/place-items): Control how items are justified and aligned simultaneously.
- [Place Self](https://yummacss.com/docs/place-self): Controls how single items are justified and aligned simultaneously.
- [Row Gap](https://yummacss.com/docs/row-gap): Controls the gap between rows in a grid layout.

## Effects

- [Backdrop Blur](https://yummacss.com/docs/backdrop-blur): Applies background blur filters to an element.
- [Blur](https://yummacss.com/docs/blur): Applies a blur filter to an element.
- [Box Shadow](https://yummacss.com/docs/box-shadow): Controls the box shadow of an element.
- [Grayscale](https://yummacss.com/docs/grayscale): Applies a grayscale filter to an element.
- [Opacity](https://yummacss.com/docs/opacity): Controls the opacity of an element.

## Interactivity

- [Appearance](https://yummacss.com/docs/appearance): Utilities to disable the styling of the original form controls.
- [Cursor](https://yummacss.com/docs/cursor): Controls the cursor style when hovering over an element.
- [Field Sizing](https://yummacss.com/docs/field-sizing): Controls the sizing of elements that have a default preferred size.
- [Pointer Events](https://yummacss.com/docs/pointer-events): Controls how an item responds to pointer events.
- [Resize](https://yummacss.com/docs/resize): Controls the way an item can be resized.
- [Scroll Behavior](https://yummacss.com/docs/scroll-behavior): Controls the scroll behavior of an element.
- [Scroll Margin](https://yummacss.com/docs/scroll-margin): Controls all of the scroll margins of an element simultaneously.
- [Scroll Padding](https://yummacss.com/docs/scroll-padding): Controls all of the scroll paddings of an element simultaneously.
- [Scroll Snap Align](https://yummacss.com/docs/scroll-snap-align): Controls where the scroll snaps to align with an element.
- [Scroll Snap Stop](https://yummacss.com/docs/scroll-snap-stop): Controls whether the scroll container passes over possible snap positions.
- [Scroll Snap Type](https://yummacss.com/docs/scroll-snap-type): Controls the strictness of snap points in a snap container.
- [Touch Action](https://yummacss.com/docs/touch-action): Controls how touch gestures are handled by an element.
- [User Select](https://yummacss.com/docs/user-select): Controls the ability of the user to select text in an element.

## Positioning

- [Aspect Ratio](https://yummacss.com/docs/aspect-ratio): Controls the aspect ratio of an element.
- [Bottom](https://yummacss.com/docs/bottom): Controls the bottom placement of positioned elements.
- [Clear](https://yummacss.com/docs/clear): Controls moving elements under floating elements.
- [Columns](https://yummacss.com/docs/columns): Controls how many columns are in an element.
- [Display](https://yummacss.com/docs/display): Controls the display box type of an element.
- [Float](https://yummacss.com/docs/float): Controls the content wrapping around an element.
- [Inset](https://yummacss.com/docs/inset): Controls the placement of positioned elements in all directions.
- [Isolation](https://yummacss.com/docs/isolation): Controls whether an element must create a new stacking context.
- [Left](https://yummacss.com/docs/left): Controls the left placement of positioned elements.
- [Object Fit](https://yummacss.com/docs/object-fit): Controls how to resize the content of a replaced element.
- [Object Position](https://yummacss.com/docs/object-position): Controls how to position the container
- [Overflow X](https://yummacss.com/docs/overflow-x): Controls how an element behaves when content overflows on the X-axis.
- [Overflow Y](https://yummacss.com/docs/overflow-y): Controls how an element behaves when content overflows on the Y-axis.
- [Overflow](https://yummacss.com/docs/overflow): Controls how an element behaves when content overflows.
- [Position](https://yummacss.com/docs/position): Controls the positioning of elements.
- [Right](https://yummacss.com/docs/right): Controls the right placement of positioned elements.
- [Top](https://yummacss.com/docs/top): Controls the top placement of positioned elements.
- [Visibility](https://yummacss.com/docs/visibility): Controls the visibility of an element without affecting the layout.
- [Z-Index](https://yummacss.com/docs/z-index): Controls the element

## Table

- [Caption Side](https://yummacss.com/docs/caption-side): Controls the caption element orientation in a table.
- [Table Layout](https://yummacss.com/docs/table-layout): Controls the table cell layout algorithm.

## SVG

- [Stroke Width](https://yummacss.com/docs/stroke-width): Controls the width of a stroke in SVG shapes.

## Transform

- [Rotate](https://yummacss.com/docs/rotate): Controls an element
- [Scale](https://yummacss.com/docs/scale): Controls how an element changes size on a 2D plane.
- [Skew](https://yummacss.com/docs/skew): Controls how an element on the 2D plane is transformed.
- [Transform Origin](https://yummacss.com/docs/transform-origin): Controls to specify where an element should start transforming.
- [Translate X](https://yummacss.com/docs/translate-x): Controls horizontal translation of an element along the X-axis.
- [Translate Y](https://yummacss.com/docs/translate-y): Controls vertical translation of an element along the Y-axis.

## Transition

- [Transition Delay](https://yummacss.com/docs/transition-delay): Controls the delay before a transition effect starts.
- [Transition Duration](https://yummacss.com/docs/transition-duration): Controls the duration of a transition effect.
- [Transition Property](https://yummacss.com/docs/transition-property): Controls which properties should have a transition effect.
- [Transition Timing Function](https://yummacss.com/docs/transition-timing-function): Controls the speed curve of a transition effect.

## Typography

- [Font Family](https://yummacss.com/docs/font-family): Controls the font family of an element.
- [Font Size](https://yummacss.com/docs/font-size): Controls the font size of an element.
- [Font Style](https://yummacss.com/docs/font-style): Controls the font style of an element.
- [Font Weight](https://yummacss.com/docs/font-weight): Controls the font weight of an element.
- [Letter Spacing](https://yummacss.com/docs/letter-spacing): Controls how the letters are spaced on an element.
- [Line Height](https://yummacss.com/docs/line-height): Controls the line height of an element.
- [List Style Position](https://yummacss.com/docs/list-style-position): Controls how bullets and numbers are positioned in lists.
- [List Style Type](https://yummacss.com/docs/list-style-type): Controls the style of a list.
- [Overflow Wrap](https://yummacss.com/docs/overflow-wrap): Controls word wrapping
- [Tab Size](https://yummacss.com/docs/tab-size): Controls the width of tab characters.
- [Text Align](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-align): Controls the alignment of text.
- [Text Decoration Line](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-decoration-line): Controls the text decoration line of an element.
- [Text Decoration Style](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-decoration-style): Controls the style of text decoration.
- [Text Decoration Thickness](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-decoration-thickness): Controls the thickness of text decorations.
- [Text Decoration](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-decoration): Controls the text decoration of an element.
- [Text Indent](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-indent): Controls the indentation, or the space before a line of block text.
- [Text Overflow](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-overflow): Controls how hidden text overflow content is displayed.
- [Text Transform](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-transform): Controls the capitalization and case of text content.
- [Text Underline Offset](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-underline-offset): Controls offsets of an underline text decoration line.
- [Text Wrap](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-wrap): Controls how text is wrapped within an element.
- [Vertical Align](https://yummacss.com/docs/vertical-align): Controls the vertical alignment of an inline or table-cell box.
- [White Space](https://yummacss.com/docs/white-space): Controls how white space is handled within an element.
- [Writing Mode](https://yummacss.com/docs/writing-mode): Sets whether lines of text are laid out horizontally or vertically.

## Full Reference
- [Full Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yumma-lib/yumma-css-docs/main/AGENTS.md): Comprehensive reference with examples and common patterns for AI systems.
